title: An Act to Update the Maine Money Transmission Modernization Act by Removing Provisions of Law Regarding Unhosted Wallets
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 3/20/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/28/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
